description: A payment retried after an ambiguous timeout charges the customer twice because no idempotency key dedupes it.
body: Failure mode: a payment request times out ambiguously and is retried (by client, proxy, or user double-click) with no idempotency key, so the processor charges the customer twice and creates duplicate orders. Detection signals: duplicate charges minutes apart; two orders with identical contents; chargeback or refund requests for the same purchase. Do not retry a charge without an idempotency key. Safer fallback: generate and persist an idempotency key per attempt, dedupe on it, and defer the charge itself to business.finance under a human gate.
